tasks.title: Listen Layer Paper: ALME conflict patching on Qwen2-Audio
tasks.definition_of_done: Listen Layer localized for Qwen2-Audio

tasks.title: FAD bias x RAVEL Cause/Isolate: text-predictable phonemes = high Cause/low Isolate (feature entanglement test)
tasks.definition_of_done: Design doc + mock showing FAD-biased phonemes have high Cause but low Isolate score

tasks.title: ENV taxonomy x Codec Probe RVQ: ENV-1 hub features = RVQ-1 semantic, ENV-3 isolated = RVQ-N acoustic
tasks.definition_of_done: Design doc: ENV-type maps to RVQ layer hierarchy; hub=semantic, isolated=fine-acoustic; intervention protocol per ENV type

tasks.title: Stressed syllable x AND/OR gate: prosodic emphasis = AND-gate, unstressed = OR-gate?
tasks.definition_of_done: Design doc + mock: stress-labeled phonemes (CMU ARPABET) → AND-frac higher for stressed; extends FAD-bias framing to prosody

tasks.title: Temporal AND-gate density as CER confidence proxy: AND-frac(t=1) predicts WER without ground truth
tasks.definition_of_done: and_confidence_mock.py: AND-frac at early decoder steps correlates with WER; Pearson r > 0.7 on mock data

tasks.title: Adversarial audio x t* detector: imperceptible adversarial noise causes t* leftward shift
tasks.definition_of_done: Design doc + mock: adversarial examples (FGSM-style) produce t* < 4 vs clean t* > 6; detection protocol

tasks.title: Phoneme confusion x OR-gate: commonly confused phoneme pairs are both OR-gate (text-predictable)
tasks.definition_of_done: confusion_gate_mock.py: phoneme confusion matrix (Whisper errors) → confused pairs have AND-frac < 0.3; links FAD bias to ASR errors

tasks.title: Speaker identity x AND-gate enrichment: speaker-specific features AND-gate, speaker-agnostic OR-gate?
tasks.definition_of_done: Design doc: speaker-ID probing features → AND-gate hypothesis; mechanistic link to audio-dependence requirement

tasks.title: LM perplexity x gc(k): low-predictability utterances have higher gc peak (more audio reliance)
tasks.definition_of_done: perplexity_gc_mock.py: mock LM PPL per phoneme → Pearson r(PPL, gc_peak) > 0.6; mechanistic basis for predictive coding

tasks.title: RAVEL Isolate(k) as beam rescoring signal: Isolate at gc-peak layer predicts beam candidate quality
tasks.definition_of_done: Design doc: Isolate(k, gc_peak) per token → correlate with beam score / CTC prob; CPU mock

tasks.title: Hallucination signature x AND→OR transition: silence/noise tokens cause AND-gate dropout = hallucination onset
tasks.definition_of_done: Design doc + mock: silence-region audio → AND-frac drops at hallucination decoder steps; unifies Q096 + Q093

tasks.title: AND-gate feature lifetime: AND-gate features persist longer across decoder steps than OR-gate features
tasks.definition_of_done: gate_lifetime_mock.py: track feature activation duration across decoder steps; mean lifetime AND > OR

tasks.title: Multi-speaker audio x ENV-3 clusters: speaker boundaries create isolated ENV-3 clusters per speaker
tasks.definition_of_done: Design doc: overlapping/diarized audio → ENV-3 clusters align with speaker turns; safety implication for speaker manipulation

tasks.title: GSAE edge density cliff x phoneme boundary: density drop aligns with acoustic segment boundaries
tasks.definition_of_done: gsae_boundary_mock.py: GSAE density per decoder step → local minima = phoneme boundaries; t* as general acoustic event detector

tasks.title: Emotion AND-gate suppression as jailbreak success metric: jailbreak shifts emotion features OR-gate
tasks.definition_of_done: emotion_jailbreak_mock.py: jailbreak condition → emotion AND-frac < 0.4 (vs clean > 0.7); combines Q118 + Q128 ENV-3 prune

tasks.title: FAD bias correction via AND-gate steering: increase AND-frac for text-predictable phonemes → reduced bias
tasks.definition_of_done: Design doc: intervention = boost AND-gate features at gc peak for high-PPL phonemes; expected WER reduction; CPU-only spec

tasks.title: AND-gate cascade density as utterance-level WER predictor: cascade_degree × gc_peak = error risk score
tasks.definition_of_done: wer_predictor_mock.py: cascade_degree (Q113) × gc_peak_AND_frac → Pearson r > 0.75 with WER on mock; zero-cost confidence

tasks.title: Persona jailbreak dual-signal detector: combine AND-ratio drop + emotion AND-frac → detection classifier
tasks.definition_of_done: persona_dual_signal_mock.py: persona injection → AND-ratio < 0.25 AND emotion_AND_frac < 0.4 → jailbreak flag; extends Q121 design

tasks.title: Codec RVQ-1 features x temporal t*: semantic RVQ tokens have larger t* (collapse later) than acoustic RVQ-N
tasks.definition_of_done: rvq_temporal_mock.py: mock RVQ-1 vs RVQ-N feature sets × t* collapse; mean t*(RVQ-1) > mean t*(RVQ-N)

tasks.title: Instruction-tuning footprint x AND-gate: do instruction-tuned models shift AND→OR for instruction-following features?
tasks.definition_of_done: Design doc: compare base vs instruct model feature populations; instruction-following → OR-gate (text-driven); safety implication

tasks.title: T-SAE input-invariant component x Schelling stability x AND-gate: triple alignment hypothesis
tasks.definition_of_done: tsae_schelling_gate_mock.py: 3-way correlation: T-SAE-invariant, Schelling-stable, AND-gate; expect all three to co-occur; Pearson r > 0.8

tasks.title: ENV-1 hub features as cross-language universal phoneme units: hub features activate for same phoneme across languages
tasks.definition_of_done: Design doc: multilingual Whisper hub features (ENV-1) → phoneme universals hypothesis; testable with multilingual audio pairs

tasks.title: Isolate(k) curve shape classification: monotone decay vs U-shape vs plateau → encodes audio usage strategy
tasks.definition_of_done: isolate_curve_shape.py: classify Isolate(k) curve per utterance; shape correlates with gc peak height; 3-class mock (decay/U/plateau)

tasks.title: News: Power Steering: Behavior Steering via Layer-to-Layer Jacobia
tasks.definition_of_done: Read and note key insights. Source: https://www.alignmentforum.org/posts/power-steering-jacobian-singular-vectors

tasks.title: News: New RFP on Interpretability from Schmidt Sciences
tasks.definition_of_done: Read and note key insights. Source: https://www.alignmentforum.org/posts/new-rfp-interpretability-schmidt-sciences
